data.title: Bitcoin ATH Fails To Hype Retail—Demand Is Actually Down
data.description:
On-chain data shows the retail interest in Bitcoin has been waning as small-holder volume has gone down during the past month. Bitcoin Retail Investor Demand Has Seen A Negative 30-Day Change In a CryptoQuant Quicktake post, an analyst has talked about the latest trend in the “Retail Investor Demand” of Bitcoin. This indicator provides an estimate for, as its name suggests, the amount of demand that the smallest of investors, the ‘retail,’ have toward the cryptocurrency right now. The metric does so by referring to the transaction volume associated with this cohort
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-ath-fails-hype-retail-demand-actually-down/

data.title: U.S. Treasury Hosts Financial Stability Oversight Council Meeting
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Treasury announced that Treasury Secretary Besent convened an executive meeting of the Financial Stability Oversight Council today. During the meeting, Treasury staff briefed the council on the activities of the President's Working Group on Financial Markets concerning digital assets. Updates were also provided by the Chair of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and the Acting Chair of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission on their respective agencies' recent actions. Speakers discussed ongoing efforts to enhance U.S. leadership in digital assets and financial technology, as well as to provide greater regulatory clarity and certainty for digital asset markets.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Department: Discussed work on digital asset markets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Treasury Department said that U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant held an executive meeting of the Financial Stability Oversight Council today. During the meeting, the committee heard a briefing from Treasury staff on the work of the President's Digital Asset Market Working Group. The Chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and the Acting Chairman of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) also provided updates on the recent actions of their respective agencies. Speakers discussed ongoing efforts to promote U.S. leadership in digital assets and financial technology and to provide greater regulatory clarity and certainty for digital asset markets. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance CEO Hails SEC Lawsuit Dismissal as ‘Significant Win,’ Credits Trump for Crypto Shift
data.description:
Binance CEO Richard Teng has welcomed the SEC’s motion to dismiss its 2023 securities complaint, framing the move as a win that eases uncertainty for the exchange and wider market. Teng said new policy direction under President Trump and a Crypto Task Force could help the US become a leading hub.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/binance-ceo-hails-sec-lawsuit-dismissal-as-significant-win-credits-trump-for-crypto-shift/
